title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Heavy participation in in-class discu
content:
✔ Heavy participation in in-class discussions, debates, and activities.
✔ Requires:
• Research Proposal
• Annotated Bibliography
• Active Peer Feedback
✔ Does NOT require: Rough Draft or Final Draft.

🎯 Who This Benefits:
• High-verbal students who process knowledge through discussion.
• Those who prefer engagement over solitary writing.

📜 Path B: The Perfectionist / The Obsessive Note-Taker

✔ Heavy focus on close readings, textual analysis, and research.
✔ Requires:
• Research Proposal
• Annotated Bibliography
• Rough Draft & Final Draft
✔ Allows flexibility in in-class assignments & discussions.

🎯 Who This Benefits:
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 54 (chunk 54/108)
